seo.title: Mortgage Calculator | Numerly
seo.description: Estimate monthly mortgage payment with principal, interest, property tax, and insurance.

intro: Estimate monthly mortgage cost including principal, interest, and escrow expenses.
explanation: The calculator computes principal and interest using amortization, then adds monthly property tax and home insurance.

formula.expression: P&I uses amortization; total monthly = principal & interest + (annual tax + annual insurance)/12

steps: Loan amount = home price - down payment
example.result: Result separates P&I from full monthly payment with escrow.

faqs.a: No, PMI is not included unless modeled separately.
Many lenders require escrow for taxes and insurance.

faqs.q: Can I use this for refinancing?
faqs.a: Yes, enter refinanced balance as loan amount via home price/down payment.

faqs.q: How does down payment affect payment?
faqs.a: Higher down payment lowers loan amount and monthly cost.
Yes, this model is for fixed-rate mortgage payments.

instructions: Loan amount = home price - down payment
formulaExplanation: The calculator computes principal and interest using amortization, then adds monthly property tax and home insurance.
edgeCases: Very long terms can significantly increase interest cost.
Zero or near-zero rates reduce compounding impact.
Always verify units (monthly vs annual) before interpreting output.
practicalTips: Compare at least two scenarios before making decisions.
Use conservative assumptions for rates and growth.
Review total cost, not just monthly amount.
